description: Evidence-labeled, live-capable route map for AllTrails browser/mobile surfaces. Not an official API contract.

tools.name: alltrails_create
tools.description: Write-gated AllTrails activity upload route; defaults to dry-run and requires ALLTRAILS_PP_ALLOW_WRITES=1 for live execution.

tools.name: alltrails_get
tools.description: Activity detail with GPS/stat surfaces. Required: activity_id.

tools.name: alltrails_get-v3
tools.description: Read AllTrails trail detail, geometry, and offline metadata surfaces by trail id; optional detail query can request offline payloads.

tools.name: alltrails_get-v3-2
tools.description: Read subscription-gated offline map metadata for a named AllTrails region without mutating account state.

tools.name: alltrails_get-v3-3
tools.description: Map static image metadata/render endpoint. Required: map_id.

tools.name: alltrails_get-v3-4
tools.description: Trail static map image metadata/render endpoint. Required: trail_id.

tools.name: alltrails_get-v3-5
tools.description: Read authenticated AllTrails user activity list for a supplied user id; response bodies are never captured in repo evidence.

tools.name: alltrails_list
tools.description: Read AllTrails trail search results by text, location, and filters using captured browser-route query patterns.

tools.name: alltrails_list-v3
tools.description: Read the current authenticated AllTrails profile route; requires caller-owned token or browser cookie when used live.
